title: OIF Energy Efficient Interfaces: AI data centers need denser, lower-latency electrical and optical interfaces
summary: OIF says next-generation AI systems need dense electrical and optical interfaces with better energy efficiency and lower latency; its EEI work includes co-packaged, near-packaged, pluggable, retimed and linear interfaces.

title: OIF Implementation Agreements list: CPO 3.2Tb/s module and co-packaging framework
summary: OIF lists the 3.2Tb/s Co-Packaged Module implementation agreement, the Co-Packaging Framework Document and ELSFP agreements under Energy Efficient Interfaces.

title: OIF 3.2Tb/s CPO Module IA: building block for 51.2Tb/s switch assemblies
summary: The OIF CPO module agreement defines a 3.2Tb/s CPO transceiver used as a building block for lower-power 51.2Tb/s switches; variants include 8x400G DR4/FR4 and external-laser options.

title: OIF Co-Packaging Framework: close placement reduces electrical channel loss
summary: The framework explains that putting optical engines close to ASICs minimizes high-speed electrical channel losses and supports higher-speed, lower-power off-chip I/O.

title: OIF ELSFP IA: external laser packaging for CPO systems
summary: The ELSFP specification addresses laser packaging requirements for CPO systems with optical engines, making external laser sources a distinct value-chain layer.

title: NVIDIA photonics reports: CPO switches enter 2026 AI-networking roadmap
summary: Industry coverage of NVIDIA's photonics roadmap says Quantum-X and Spectrum-X photonics switches use CPO/silicon photonics to reduce power and support 800G-class ports at very high aggregate bandwidth.

title: 中际旭创 2025 annual report: 100G to 1.6T high-speed optical modules
summary: The 2025 annual report states that the company provides 100G, 200G, 400G, 800G and 1.6T high-speed optical modules for cloud data-center customers, and its 1.6T products include EML and silicon-photonics platforms.

title: 中际旭创 product page: data center and AI interconnect portfolio
summary: The company product page lists data-center and AI interconnect products covering 100G, 200G, 400G, 800G and 1.6T, with 800G OSFP/QSFP-DD and 1.6T OSFP product families.

title: Eoptolink product page: 1.6T OSFP, 800G LPO and NPO/XPO photonics
summary: Eoptolink lists 1.6T OSFP transceivers for AI clusters and cloud data centers, 800G LPO modules, plus 6.4T silicon-photonics NPO and 12.8T XPO liquid-cooled optics messaging.

title: TFC official site: precision optical components, optical-engine solutions and global manufacturing
summary: TFC describes 20 years of high-precision optical-device design and manufacturing, optical active/passive devices, high-speed optical-engine solutions, FAU, micro-optics, fiber connectors, electro-optical integration packaging and manufacturing bases in China and Thailand.

title: T&S Communications official site: MPO/MTP cables, next-gen multi-fiber interconnects and MT ferrules
summary: T&S lists MPO/MTP cables, next-generation multi-fiber interconnects, shuffle assemblies, fiber optic flex circuits, ceramic ferrules, MT ferrules and MPO connector kits, making it a direct A-share mapping for the MPO layer.

title: Yuanjie Semitech official site: datacom DFB/CWDM/LWDM and high-power CW lasers
summary: Yuanjie lists DATACOM 10G/25G/50G DFB CWDM/LWDM and high-power CW laser products, with production lines from MOCVD epitaxy to chip manufacturing and automatic testing.

title: Taclink official site: optical transceivers, amplifiers, components and 1.6T OSFP DR8 launch
summary: Taclink describes itself as a supplier of optical transceivers, optical amplifiers, optical components and subsystems, and announced a 1.6T OSFP DR8 optical transceiver at OFC 2026.
